reasoning: This animation sequence will depict two individuals standing side-by-side, represented by the robot's arms.  The focus is on conveying a sense of togetherness and connection. The animation starts with both arms at the sides, then moves to a slight embrace before returning to a relaxed, side-by-side stance.  This avoids any abrupt or unnatural movements. Frame 1 will show a neutral start position. Frame 2 will show the arms moving slightly toward each other, suggesting a connection. Frame 3 will show a gentle embrace, conveying closeness.  Frame 4 will show the arms moving back to the neutral position.  Frame 5 will show a final neutral position, emphasizing the gentle transition. The neutral position will use joint1 at 0.0 and joint2 at -90.0 for both arms, simulating arms hanging naturally.  The slight embrace will involve both arms moving slightly inward with a gentle forward pitch. The transition will be smooth and fluid, emphasizing the sense of connection.
